item.title: Some people are still mothers
item.description: I went to lunch today to a Chinese buffet near my work. Since it was mothers day I decided I would pay for a moms meal secretly. I saw a lady mid 50s maybe early 60s. She looked sad thought maybe her kids stood her up for a mothers day lunch. So I paid for her lunch, and when the waitress went over and told her that her meal was already paid for and gave her a note I had wrote happy mothers day on to her. She began crying. Not just a how sweet cry but an ugly turn peoples heads ugly crying. I went over to the poor lady to see if she was ok. She looked at me oddly when I sat across from her at her table, and asked if she was alright. She opened up completely telling me her son had passed away last month after being hit by a drunk driver. Her and her son would come to this Chinese restaurant every Sunday to chat and spend time together. She had thought about not coming in today but she said she had a little voice tell her to do it that it would help her somehow. When the waitress told her that someone paid her meal she had a flash of her son. I sat with her a bit until she was able to calm down and she apologized for making such a scene and thanked me for listening. I told her that she had no need to apologize for grieving and that I hoped she would have a good day. She asked for a hug as we left and I gave her one and I swear it felt like a hug a mother would give her child. I felt so heart broken for her. If you can remember to call her and say you love her. If you can see her do so and give her a hug. Have a happy mothers day Imgur.
item.dc:creator: retailmemedrone

item.title: Not mine but I've been there and this is accurate.
item.description:
Cappadocia, Turkey. Getting up at 3AM for the trip to the balloon launch site was almost painful but totally worth it.
And this happens everyday, weather and local holidays permitting.

item.title: Worried to see that Russia seem to have unveiled a new kind of tank at todays parade. They are very different to the ones seen so far in the Ukraine. They seem to have some kind of gun turret on the top and none of them are on fire.
item.dc:creator: babymonkee

item.title: When someone tells you who they are, believe them.
item.dc:creator: servingwithtg

item.title: 25 Days since my last drink
item.description: 25 Days Without Drinking First photo taken before I checked into a facility for alcohol use and for my mental health. The second is today. 25 days of no alcohol and new medication. Clear skin, more energy, low blood pressure, healthy sleep schedule. Feeling like a whole new person. My mom doesn’t know about any of this but she told my husband after lunch today that she hasn’t seen me seeming so alive and alert in a long time. Glad I could give her that for Mother’s Day. IWNDWYT! FP Edit: 1. I really appreciate all the kind words and uplifting comments. Love this community. 2. IWNDWYT is an acronym often used in support communities online. It stands for “I will not drink with you today.” 3. I’ve had a couple of people comment about or shoot me messages re: recovery facilities. I’m happy to answer any questions anyone has. I did a lot of research going in and talked to a lot of people during my time who had been in a LOT of different facilities so while I can’t answer every question you might have, I can certainly answer many of them and am happy to share my personal experience as well. Have a great week, Imgur!
item.dc:creator: Flamesonthesideofmyface

item.title: Day 345: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me
item.description: Garlic Burger Double ⠀ Two Beef Smash Patties, American Cheese, Red Onion, Garlic Chips, And Garlic Mayo On A Soft Brown Bun From Sunday Burger Club (선데이 버거 클럽) In Seoul, South Korea Previous Day 344: https://imgur.com/gallery/RPpW7FG MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD @CrisprCAS Daily Tag 20 Days Remain
item.dc:creator: crypto
